No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Law/B/3&4) and develops specialized skills in French legal literature and database use, aligning with Targets 4.3 (tertiary education) and 4.4 (skills for employment).

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: While skills for employment are gained, the course does not directly address broader economic growth, decent work conditions, or employment policies.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to industry, innovation, or infrastructure development.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to climate change or action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course explicitly covers '法國司法制度之說明與討論' and '法國行政法院案例翻譯與討論,' directly contributing to understanding the rule of law and effective institutions (Targets 16.3, 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course fosters 'International Perspective' and promotes international knowledge sharing (Target 17.6) by enabling students to understand another country's legal system and literature.
